case_title: SHAW ROAD PROPERTIES VS GOURMET SPECIALTIES

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT SERVED AS TO PLAINTIFF SHAW ROAD PROPERTIES

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SHAW ROAD PROPERTIES IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT GOURMET SPECIALTIES EACH PARTY TO BEAR ITS OWN COSTS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT GOURMET SPECIALTIES IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT SHAW ROAD PROPERTIES WITH EACH PARTY TO BEAR ITS OWN COSTS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,134.00 FILED BY SHAW ROAD PROPERTIES AS TO DEFENDANT GOURMET SPECIALTIES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-08-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $2,288.21 FILED BY GOURMET SPECIALTIES AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT SHAW ROAD PROPERTIES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-26-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GOURMET SPECIALTIES
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAY-08-1992, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO MAY-26-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
